mapper.select: select id, calendar_id as "calendarId", biz_date as "bizDate", day_type as "dayType", holiday_name as "holidayName", description, created_at as "createdAt", updated_at as "updatedAt" from batch.calendar_holiday where calendar_id = #{calendarId} order by biz_date

select id, calendar_id as "calendarId", biz_date as "bizDate", day_type as "dayType", holiday_name as "holidayName", description, created_at as "createdAt", updated_at as "updatedAt" from batch.calendar_holiday where id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into batch.calendar_holiday ( calendar_id, biz_date, day_type, holiday_name, description ) values
(#{item.calendarId}, #{item.bizDate}, #{item.dayType}, #{item.holidayName}, #{item.description})
mapper.update: update batch.calendar_holiday set biz_date = #{bizDate}, day_type = #{dayType}, holiday_name = #{holidayName}, description = #{description}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
